name: todo-app
description: Multi-user Todo App with sharing and collaboration

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "node server/index.js" "npx vite client --config client/vite.config.js"
scripts.share: npm run build && concurrently -n server,tunnel "node server/index.js" "npx localtunnel --port 3001 --print-requests"
